task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Realtime Broadcast Notifications** (Level 5)

ARCHETYPE: realtime_app. Shape: backend-only WebSocket server (no pages, no CRUD scaffold, no auth). Subscribe + broadcast are the CORE — not a POST endpoint wrapper. DO NOT build HTTP endpoints for messages. DO NOT build pages. DO NOT use requires login. The ENTIRE app is one `subscribe to 'channel':` block that listens for incoming messages on the 'notifications' channel and broadcasts them to all connected clients. Pers
final_source:
build for javascript backend

create a Messages table:
  text, required
  created_at_date, auto

subscribe to 'notifications':
  broadcast to all message
  save message to Messages

when user calls GET /api/history:
  send back all Messages
